entry.title: Tarot Interviews Comes To Bearded Theory
entry.summary: I’ll be visiting Bearded Theory 2026 with Tarot Interviews to capture vox pops, one-card conversations and quick chats with artists, festivalgoers and curious passers-by. One tarot card, one question. Across the weekend, I’ll be roaming the festival site with a deck, a microphone and a…
entry.content:
I’ll be visiting Bearded Theory 2026 with Tarot Interviews to capture vox pops, one-card conversations and quick chats with artists, festivalgoers and curious passers-by.

One tarot card, one question.

Across the weekend, I’ll be roaming the festival site with a deck, a microphone and a camera, inviting people to share something prompted by their card. These will become short-form video, audio and written pieces for Tarot Interviews and related channels.

I’m especially interested in those moments that stay with people long after the weekend ends: muddy boots, a smile left from the compliment of a friendly stranger, the feeling that your bones are still vibrating at the same frequency of Garbage's opening number.

If you see me at Bearded Theory and fancy taking part, come and say hello!. Look for the man in the bowler hat with a tarot card in the brim.
